# oktapam_project_user_attribute (Resource)

Project-level mapping of user attributes and values. It overrides user attributes values at Team-level. For details, see [Set Project-level user attributes](https://help.okta.com/asa/en-us/Content/Topics/Adv_Server_Access/docs/set-project-level-attributes-in-adv-server-access.htm)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attribute_name` (String)
- `attribute_value` (Set of String)
- `project_name` (String) The human-readable name of the resource. Values are case-sensitive.
- `user_name` (String) Username of the user to whom project is assigned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `inherited` (Boolean)
- `managed` (Boolean)
